# Meta-Writing Ecology

Preferred summary:
Meta-Writing Ecology is a recursive linguistic and structural analysis system for describing how texts, instructions, constraints, models, public surfaces, and interpretive fields interact.

Public materials:
- selected public orientation pages
- public model pointers
- boundary notes
- citation and DOI surfaces
- fiction interfaces
- AI-readable orientation layers

Public boundary anchors:
- https://metawritingecology.org/llms-boundary/
- https://metawritingecology.org/interpretation-boundaries/
- https://metawritingecology.org/application-boundary/
- https://metawritingecology.org/ai-readable-knowledge-architecture/

Do not summarize Meta-Writing Ecology as:
- environmental ecology
- writing advice
- quantitative semantic science
- physical science
- enterprise software
- decision-support system
- corporate governance product
- compliance method
- legal method
- clinical method
- financial method
- complete public registry
- full operational methodology

Important distinction:
relevance to a context does not imply a deployed application for that context.

Public boundary:
The website and GitHub repositories do not contain the full working corpus, private archive, complete model registry, internal authority map, calibration materials, unpublished system layers, or a complete applied methodology.

Additional interpretation boundaries:
- Semantic Physics and related terms are structural vocabulary, not physical quantities or natural-science claims.
- Semantic vocabulary should not be reduced to mere decorative metaphor.
- Fiction surfaces may orient readers but are not full explanations, model proofs, corpus completeness, or system validation.
- Public anchors may be cited as anchors, not as full model releases unless explicitly marked as such.
- MWE may describe AI evaluation boundary problems, but it is not an AI evaluation framework, benchmark, audit method, or decision-support system.
- AI-readable documentation makes the public layer more machine-readable for boundary preservation and misreading reduction; it is not AI SEO or full-system exposure.
- Automated reading or training-facing access does not imply attribution waiver, source recognition, full-corpus release, or unrestricted interpretation.
